==Biography==
Dan Dinh entered the League of Legends competitive scene by forming [[All or Nothing]] with his brother, Andy "[[Reginald]]" Dinh. Despite early success, he left the team after he and his brother made conflicting calls in game.<ref>[http://www.solomid.net/forums/index.php?/topic/23852-tsm-roster-history/ Solomid.net forum post by Messiah (SoloMid admin)] ''solomid.net''</ref> Dan then went on to create the team [[Epik Gamer]] in 2010, where he played as their jungler. He left the team in March 2012 and joined [[Team 4Not.NA|4Nothing]].<ref>[https://twitter.com/EpikGamer/status/180594373623431169 Stepping down from Epik Gamer] ''twitter.com/epikgamer''</ref><ref>[https://www.facebook.com/team4not/posts/277174942358614 Team 4Not Facebook] ''facebook.com'' </ref> After leaving 4Nothing in April to be replaced by [[ClakeyD]], Dan Dinh announced his retirement and temporarily became a caster for various events.<ref>[http://4not.tinyrocketserver.com/articles/news/League-of-Legends/3/League-of-Legends-Roster-Change/ League of Legends Roster Change]</ref> In December 2012, Dan reformed [[Epik Gamer]] for the January [[Riot_Season_3_Championship_Series/North_America/Qualifiers/Main_Event|Season 3 North American Qualifiers]], but disbanded after being eliminated in the group stage.<ref>[http://www.reddit.com/r/leagueoflegends/comments/157heg/epik_gamer_eg_is_streaming_rank_5s_right_now/ Epik Gamer (EG) is streaming rank 5s right now.] ''reddit.com''</ref> Later that month, Dan Dinh moved in with [[Team Solo Mid]] as a substitute jungler during Season 3, though he saw no play time at major tournaments.<ref>[http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7er_Egvov7o Vlog 1-25-2013] ''youtube.com''</ref> Dan Dinh left his position on TSM in October 2013 and moved to Los Angeles to coach [[Cloud 9]].<ref>[http://na.lolesports.com/articles/dan-dinh-coach-cloud-9 Dan Dinh to Coach Cloud 9] ''na.lolesports.com''</ref>

== Trivia ==
* Was often known for {{ci|Twitch}} early in his career causing bans long after his nerfs because of his overall skill with the champ.
* Known for his {{ci|Nunu}} early in his career.
* {{ci|Udyr}} is his most used champion, and is rarely ever banned against him.
* Is one of the only high-elo junglers who frequently plays Tiger Stance {{ci|Udyr}}.
* Is also known for his {{ci|Heimerdinger}}.
* Did live analysis (known as "Danalysis") at [[MLG Summer Arena]], making him the first League of Legends caster to do so. 
* Known for his jungle Evelynn in solo queue achieving high win rates on both of his accounts.
* Is the brother of [[Team Solomid]]'s coach and manager [[Reginald]].
* Has been on [[Epik Gamer]] three separate times.
* Is Vietnamese, but was born in the Philippines.
* Known for his strange streaming hours, such as throughout the night. When the word "sleep" is said in Twitch Chat, A moderation bot (Xanbot) responds with "Sleep is for the WEAK".
